description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic rectangular form with a white painted body and a contrasting natural wood top. The front face displays four drawers, with the top row split into two smaller drawers and the lower three being full-width, each equipped with metallic rectangular recessed handles. The sides and back are plain, with subtle panel detailing on the sides and a smooth, unadorned back. The wood top has a beveled edge and a visible grain pattern, adding a touch of warmth and texture to the otherwise clean design. The base is slightly extended, providing stability and a traditional look. This piece is suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, such as porches, garages, or entryways.
description: A white chest of drawers with a natural wood top, featuring four drawers with metallic recessed handles and subtle panel detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers, two small on top and three large below, all with metallic recessed handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain white panel with subtle rectangular detailing and the wood top's beveled edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a smooth, unadorned white back and the full expanse of the wood top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with plain paneling and the wood top's edge visible.
